summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Firebase-based catalog management application. All major functionality working excellently. Firebase permissions issue from previous iteration has been resolved. CRUD operations, authentication, color system, search, and responsive design all functioning perfectly.

minor_warnings.issue: Network connection warnings (ERR_ABORTED) in console logs
minor_warnings.impact: No functional impact - all operations work correctly
minor_warnings.note: Likely related to browser automation environment, not affecting actual functionality

passed_tests: Firebase Authentication login blocks UI until authenticated ✅
Dashboard loads correctly after successful authentication ✅
Product creation with name and colors works perfectly ✅
Smart color system with 500+ colors: oro, plata, vino, esmeralda, miel ✅
Tone processing works: azul claro, rojo oscuro, pastel rosa ✅
Invalid color handling with proper error messages ✅
Product appears in dashboard with correct name and color circles ✅
Color tooltips work on hover ✅
Product editing functionality works completely ✅
Product deletion with confirmation dialog works ✅
Search by product name works correctly ✅
Search by color name works correctly ✅
Photo upload elements present and configured (multiple files, image types) ✅
Photo carousel UI elements ready (navigation buttons, indicators) ✅
Maximum 5 photos limit properly displayed ✅
Responsive design works on mobile (390x844), tablet (768x1024), desktop (1920x1080) ✅
Elegant design with beige color scheme and 12px rounded corners ✅
Toast notifications system working (Sonner) ✅
Modal open/close functionality works perfectly ✅
Logout functionality returns to login screen ✅
Empty state displays correctly when no products ✅
Base64 image storage system ready (compression to 1000px, quality 0.7) ✅
